key_risks: Hotter-than-expected CPI on June 10 could pressure rate-sensitive cyclicals
FOMC June 16-17 decision may trigger volatility if hawkish signals emerge
Weakening consumer sentiment could weigh on discretionary spending and related sectors

portfolio.rationale: High oil prices at $91+ and EIA inventory draw forecasts support sector outperformance over the next month.
Strong recent 30-day returns and defensive characteristics amid sticky inflation and upcoming data releases.
ISM manufacturing expansion at 54.0 signals improving factory activity likely to lift the sector before July close.

portfolio_rationale: Overweight cyclical sectors with positive momentum and macro support to target alpha versus SP500 in the one-month window.
rationale_summary: Energy benefits from elevated crude, healthcare provides stability, and industrials capture manufacturing rebound signals.
